classification_consistency_check.reason: Score 1.40 yields Not Ready band but 11 High findings (from 11 core questions at score 1) maps to Remediation Required tier. The 18 non-core questions at score 1 produce Medium severity rather than High, capping the High count at 11. The extremely low overall score reflects the breadth of gaps across all 36 evaluated questions (29 scoring 1), while the count-based system limits High to core-question scores only.

items.description: Implement CI/CD, IaC, GitOps, and progressive delivery.
Decompose monoliths, adopt microservices patterns, implement event-driven architecture.
